evidence.claim: Built RAG-based customer support chatbot, document ingestion pipeline, and answer-generation layer
evidence.source_text: Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot integrated with our existing ticketing system. Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone) and the answer-generation layer

evidence.claim: Used OpenAI embeddings, Pinecone, GPT-4, BLEU, and ROUGE metrics
evidence.source_text: embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone) and the answer-generation layer (initially GPT-4... Designed the evaluation framework with both automatic metrics (BLEU, ROUGE)

evidence.claim: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow, Kubeflow, and internal feature store
evidence.source_text: Built and operated production ML pipelines using MLflow for experiment tracking, Kubeflow for orchestration, and our internal feature store.

evidence.claim: Expertise in Salesforce CRM, Semantic Search, TTS, Milvus, BentoML, pgvector, Weaviate, Haystack, Vector Search, LoRA, MLOps, CNN

evidence.claim: Deployment of RAG-based chatbot cut average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Built churn prediction model used by customer success team
evidence.source_text: My main project was a churn prediction model that's now used by the customer success team to prioritize outreach.

evidence.claim: Led team migration from keyword-search to embedding-based retrieval
evidence.source_text: Recently, I led the team that migrated our keyword-search-based product to embedding-based retrieval.

evidence.claim: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project
evidence.source_text: Mentored a junior engineer through their first end-to-end ML project last year.

evidence.claim: Completed LangChain for LLM Application Development and Deep Learning Specialization
evidence.source_text: Certifications: LangChain for LLM Application Development (DeepLearning.AI, 2020); Deep Learning Specialization (Coursera/DeepLearning.AI, 2021)

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.

evidence.claim: Values practical experience over academic theory
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
